展示平台核心运营指标概览: Overview of core platform operation metrics, including tenant statistics, subscription status, and system health.
全平台汇总数据实时更新: Platform-wide aggregated data, updated in real time.
仪表盘对所有已登录用户可见: The dashboard is visible to all authenticated users.
查看顶部统计卡片了解平台概况: View the top stat cards to understand the platform overview
查看租户增长趋势图了解增长情况: View the tenant growth trend chart to understand growth
查看订阅分布图了解套餐使用情况: View the subscription distribution chart for package usage
左侧菜单可访问所有管理模块: Use the sidebar menu to access all management modules
统计数据实时更新来源于后端接口: Statistics are updated in real time from backend APIs
若统计数据加载失败请检查网络连接: If statistics fail to load, please check your network connection
